VisitUs provides features such as real-time evacuation roll calls, instant notifications, and pre-registration of visitors, while MTSS Group offers self-service kiosks, QR code-based sign-ins, and integration with existing access control systems. Given these overlapping functionalities, MTSS Group is a direct competitor to VisitUs.
